---
name: Clarification Question
about: Ask questions about WPShadow features, philosophy, or strategy
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question, documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Question Category
<!-- What area is this question about? -->
- [ ] Product features (how something works)
- [ ] Philosophy/principles (why we do things)
- [ ] Roadmap/timeline (when something ships)
- [ ] Messaging/copy (how to talk about something)
- [ ] Technical details (need developer input)
- [ ] Community strategy
- [ ] Other: 

## The Question
<!-- Ask your question clearly and specifically -->


## Why I'm Asking
<!-- What prompted this question? User inquiry, content creation, support thread, etc. -->


## What I Think (Optional)
<!-- If you have a guess or assumption, share it here -->


## Urgency
<!-- How quickly do you need an answer? -->
- [ ] Not urgent (informational/learning)
- [ ] Soon (needed for this week's work)
- [ ] Urgent (user is waiting for response)
- [ ] Critical (crisis situation, need immediate answer)

## Context/Background
<!-- Any additional context that helps answer the question -->


## Related Documentation
<!-- Have you checked these docs? (helps avoid duplicating existing info) -->

- [ ] FEATURE_MATRIX_DIAGNOSTICS.md
- [ ] FEATURE_MATRIX_TREATMENTS.md
- [ ] Other (specify): 

## What I'll Do With The Answer
<!-- How will you use this information? -->
- [ ] Respond to user
- [ ] Create content
- [ ] Update my understanding
- [ ] Train someone else
